query: SELECT b.id AS bookingId, b.bookingNumber, b.reservationId, b.status AS bookingStatus, b.scheduledDate, ro.id AS opId, ro.opStatus FROM bookings b LEFT JOIN reservation_operational ro ON ro.reservationId = b.reservationId ORDER BY b.id;
